name: python3-defusedxml
title: python3-defusedxml
summary: XML bomb protection for Python stdlib modules (for Python 3)
description:
XML bomb protection for Python stdlib modules (for Python 3)
The results of an attack on a vulnerable XML library can be fairly dramatic.
With just a few hundred bytes of XML data an attacker can occupy several
gigabytes of memory within seconds. An attacker can also keep
CPUs busy for a long time with a small to medium size request.
.
This library allows for XML to be parsed in a manner that avoids these
pitfalls.
.
This package contains the module for the Python 3 interpreter.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-defusedxml because XML bomb protection for Python stdlib modules (for Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-defusedxml as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-defusedxml with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-defusedxml --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
